title: Peruvian Comforting Dal Bake
description: A flavorful and comforting Peruvian-inspired dal bake recipe. This dish combines the warmth of spices with the comforting texture of a crunchy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: peruvian spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, chili powder, and paprika

instructions: In a large pan, heat the floral oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the toor dal, peruvian spices, and dal spices. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the dal is cooking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing the crumble and flaky pastry.
Transfer the dal mixture to a baking dish and top with the crumble topping.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
If using cheese, sprinkle on top and return to oven for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Note: You can also make this recipe in a slow cooker. Simply cook the dal mixture on low for 3-4 hours and then top with the crumble topping and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
